name: IMA Sevio AI Generation
tagline: Ima Sevio 1.0 / 1.0-Fast for text-to-video and image-to-video.
description: IMA Sevio video generation via IMA Open API with fixed Sevio model scope. Supports text_to_video, image_to_video, first_last_frame_to_video, and reference_image_to_video. Requires IMA_API_KEY. Local media paths are uploaded through IMA upload service before task creation.
credentialNotice: IMA_API_KEY is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). The key is sent to api.imastudio.com for product/task APIs. For local media files, the key is also sent to imapi.liveme.com to obtain upload tokens before uploading to OSS/CDN URLs returned by that API.
optionalDependencyNote: This skill is self-contained. If ima-knowledge-ai is installed, the agent may optionally read its reference files (~/.openclaw/skills/ima-knowledge-ai/references/*) for workflow and visual-consistency guidance.

localPaths.purpose: Preference cache and operational logs; logs auto-cleaned after 7 days.

key_features: Fixed model allowlist: Ima Sevio 1.0 and Ima Sevio 1.0-Fast
